productCapabilities.reason: Raw storage access bypasses domain and tenant policy.
Generic method execution is not a stable public contract.
Shell, migration, reset, and health controls remain operator-only.
Provider, billing, authentication, and storage secrets are never public data.
Execution documents remain hidden behind safe automation resources.
Device and object-storage protocols remain implementation details.
